content.thinking: Now I need to update the sessions.json to create a fresh session. Let me also update the sessions.json to reset the session.

arguments.command:
cat /home/openclaw/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/sessions.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys, time
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
# Reset the main session
data['agent:main:main'] = {
    'sessionId': str(int(time.time()*1000)) + '-reset',
    'updatedAt': int(time.time()*1000),
    'systemSent': False,
    'abortedLastRun': False,
    'chatType': 'direct',
    'deliveryContext': {'channel': 'webchat'},
    'lastChannel': 'webchat'
}
print(json.dumps(data, indent=2))
" > /tmp/sessions_new.json && mv /tmp/sessions_new.json /home/openclaw/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/sessions.json && echo "Session reset complete"
